response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a full-stack web and distributed-systems developer whose core expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not C++. His only verifiable C++ work is approximately six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project, amounting to a fraction of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no evidence of Windows platform development, no SQL Server or Oracle usage (only MongoDB and MySQL appear), and zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or any adjacent financial-services domain. The profile is fundamentally misaligned with every mandatory requirement of this role.
strengths: Broad polyglot background demonstrates ability to learn new languages and paradigms quickly
Solid CI/CD and DevOps experience (GitLab CI, Docker, Artifactory) partially satisfies the desirable pipeline skills
Java experience at Altom and general scripting background partially meet optional skill criteria
concerns: C++ experience totals roughly six months professionally — far below the 5–10 year mandatory threshold, with no Windows platform work evident
No capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or any financial-services domain exposure across the entire career history
Database background is MongoDB and MySQL only; no SQL Server or Oracle experience, which are mandatory requirements
